fields.label: Store
fields.description: Which WooCommerce store this mapping belongs to.

fields.label: WooCommerce Product ID
fields.description: WooCommerce numeric product ID. This is the primary identifier from the WooCommerce database.

fields.label: ERPNext Item
fields.description: The ERPNext Item linked to this WooCommerce product. Used to sync pricing, stock, and status.

fields.label: Product Type
fields.description: WooCommerce product type. Variable products have child variations, each mapped separately.

fields.label: WooCommerce Variation ID
fields.description: For variable product variations only. Leave blank for simple products and variable product templates.

fields.label: Last Synced
fields.description: When this item was last successfully synced between ERPNext and WooCommerce.

fields.label: WooCommerce SKU
fields.description: WooCommerce SKU at time of last sync. Used for matching on re-import and conflict detection.
